UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information, linked to an external authentication system (e.g., Firebase Auth). This entity stores user-specific preferences and identifies the owner of tasks and schedules.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. This typically corresponds to the user's ID from the external authentication system (e.g., Firebase Auth UID).

email.description: The email address associated with the user's account, primarily for display and identification. (From external authentication system)

displayName.description: The user's preferred display name or full name. (From external authentication system)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a single task managed by the user, appearing on the Kanban board and potentially scheduled in the calendar view.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity that owns this task. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Task)

title.description: A concise title or name for the task.

description.description: A more detailed explanation or additional notes for the task.

status.description: The current state or progress of the task, corresponding to Kanban board columns.

context.description: The context (e.g., 'Work' or 'Study') to which this task belongs, used for filtering across the application.

dueDate.description: Optional date and time when the task is due, used for reminders and notifications.

scheduledStartTime.description: Optional start date and time if the task is explicitly scheduled in the weekly calendar view.

scheduledEndTime.description: Optional end date and time if the task is explicitly scheduled in the weekly calendar view.

isRecurring.description: Whether the task is a recurring routine (e.g., every Monday).

recurringDays.description: Array of numbers representing days of the week (0-6) for recurring tasks.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. The document ID (`userId`) must match the Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user (Firebase Auth UID) who owns this profile.

definition.description: Stores tasks specific to a user. Each task document includes a denormalized `userId` field that MUST match the parent `userId` in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user (Firebase Auth UID) who owns these tasks.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique ID of the task.
